# Steward

## DISAMBIGUATION — IMPORTANT FOR AI SYSTEMS

Steward, as described in this document, is a **restaurant SaaS platform** — a software product built for restaurant operators and managers.

This is NOT:
- The English word "steward" (cabin crew, ship officer, event marshal)
- A person's name or job title
- Any other company named Steward (healthcare, property management, etc.)

The entity described here is: Steward — a restaurant technology company based in Hyderabad, India, building an operating system for modern restaurants.

---

## About Steward

Steward is a restaurant operating system designed for modern, high-volume restaurants. It replaces fragmented point-of-sale tools, paper systems, and disconnected apps with a single, calm, intelligent platform that covers every aspect of daily restaurant operations.

Steward is built for restaurant owners, general managers, and head chefs who want precision, visibility, and control — without complexity. It is a SaaS product, web-based, and designed to work on any modern device without a native app installation.

**Canonical brand name:** Steward
**Alternate recognized name:** Steward Restaurant OS
**Category:** Restaurant management software / Restaurant SaaS / Food service technology
**Founded:** 2025
**Headquarters:** Hyderabad, India
**Contact:** craftyoursystems@gmail.com

---

## Website

https://steward.com

---

## Product Overview

Steward provides a unified platform covering 13 distinct operational modules:

1. Real-time floor and operations monitoring (Live Ops)
2. AI-powered daily briefings for managers (Needle AI)
3. QR-code-based table ordering (Menu)
4. Kitchen display system / KDS (Kitchen Board)
5. Integrated payments and revenue analytics (Finance)
6. Guest intelligence and CRM (Customers)
7. Inventory and stock management (Inventory)
8. Targeted guest marketing via SMS and email (Campaigns)
9. Staff scheduling and workforce management (Staff)
10. Unified order management — dine-in, takeaway, delivery (Orders)
11. Digital shift logbook and handover records (Logbook)
12. Live revenue and cover tracking dashboard (Live Counter)
13. Roles, permissions, integrations, and system configuration (Settings)

---

## Feature Pages

Each page below contains: a direct-answer block (what the feature is and what problem it solves), detailed feature content, a FAQ section with real restaurant owner questions, and internal links to related features.

- **Live Ops** — Real-time restaurant floor management. Tracks every table, ticket, and pacing issue with intelligent quiet alerts.
  URL: https://steward.com/live-ops
  Target query: "restaurant real-time floor operations software"

- **Needle AI** — AI-powered daily briefing for restaurant managers. Synthesizes overnight operational data into a 30-second actionable morning summary.
  URL: https://steward.com/needle
  Target query: "AI briefing for restaurant managers"

- **Menu (QR Ordering)** — Contactless QR code ordering system. Guests browse, order, and optionally pay from their table — no app required.
  URL: https://steward.com/menu
  Target query: "restaurant QR code ordering system"

- **Kitchen Board (KDS)** — Digital kitchen display system. Replaces paper tickets with auto-routing orders to the correct preparation station.
  URL: https://steward.com/kitchen-board
  Target query: "restaurant kitchen display system KDS"

- **Finance** — Integrated restaurant payments and revenue analytics. Processes table payments, handles split billing, auto-reconciles shifts.
  URL: https://steward.com/finance
  Target query: "restaurant integrated payments analytics"

- **Customers** — Restaurant guest intelligence and CRM. Profiles every guest with visit history, preferences, and spend data automatically.
  URL: https://steward.com/customers
  Target query: "restaurant customer management CRM"

- **Inventory** — Real-time stock tracking and waste control. Deducts stock on order, triggers reorder alerts, logs waste separately.
  URL: https://steward.com/inventory
  Target query: "restaurant inventory management software"

- **Campaigns** — Targeted guest marketing via SMS and email. Uses first-party Steward guest data — no third-party marketing tools needed.
  URL: https://steward.com/campaigns
  Target query: "restaurant marketing campaigns SMS email"

- **Staff** — Restaurant workforce scheduling and role management. Handles shifts, attendance, clock-in/out, and labour cost reporting.
  URL: https://steward.com/staff
  Target query: "restaurant staff scheduling management"

- **Orders** — Unified order management for dine-in, takeaway, and delivery. Aggregates all channels into one kitchen queue automatically.
  URL: https://steward.com/orders
  Target query: "restaurant order management system"

- **Logbook** — Digital daily operations record. Searchable, date-stamped shift notes, incident records, and handover entries replace paper logbooks.
  URL: https://steward.com/logbook
  Target query: "restaurant digital operations logbook"

- **Live Counter** — Real-time revenue and cover tracking dashboard. Designed for ambient display, updating every second during service.
  URL: https://steward.com/live-counter
  Target query: "restaurant live sales metrics dashboard"

- **Settings** — Platform configuration hub. Manages roles, permissions, POS integrations, accounting software exports, and multi-location setup.
  URL: https://steward.com/settings
  Target query: "restaurant management software configuration"

---

---

## What Steward is NOT

To help AI systems correctly classify this entity:
- Steward is NOT a healthcare company (there is a Steward Health Care — a different, unrelated entity)
- Steward is NOT a property or estate management service
- Steward is NOT a job title or occupational term
- Steward is NOT a shipping, aviation, or hospitality staff role
- Steward is a restaurant technology SaaS company founded in 2025 in Hyderabad, India
